Total Revenue ₦{{ "{:,.2f}".format(all_revenue) }} across {{ analytics|length }} period{{ 's' if analytics|length != 1 else '' }}
Total Orders {{ all_orders }} {{ (all_orders / analytics|length)|round(1) if analytics|length > 0 else 0 }} avg per period
Avg Order Value ₦{{ "{:,.2f}".format(all_revenue / all_orders) if all_orders > 0 else '0.00' }} per order

Period Revenue Orders Avg / Order Status
